title: Inventory
description: Stores stock on hand quantities for specific serial numbers, batches, and/or locations, linking back to the Product table. Internal Name: Inventory.

Identifier.description: The serial or batch number identifier for this specific stock item instance.

LastModifiedTime.description: Date and time the record was last altered.

Location.description: The stock location code. An empty string or null typically represents the default location if location tracking is enabled.

ProductSeq.description: The sequence number of the parent product master record (links to Product.SequenceNumber).

Qty.description: The quantity (stock on hand) of the item with this specific Identifier at this specific Location.

Expiry.description: The expiry date, if applicable (for batch-tracked items marked as expiring).
